programmes.show_description: Fleur De Lys. The team travel to the oldest pub in the New Forest to investigate numerous reports of it being haunted and end up making a shocking discovery. S1, Ep6
Great Fulford. The team journeys to a country estate in Devon with a dark history, where lingering spirits and a tormented child's ghost sightings have been reported. S1, Ep7
Fyvie Castle. The team explore a Scottish castle with an infamous history which is apparently plagued by an evil curse and the soul of a restless woman. S1, Ep8
Teleshopping.
Salvage Hunters Celebrity Special. Hunting items with a distinctly French connection, aspiring collector and TV star Fred Sirieix joins Drew and Tee on the road to learn the trade. S15, Ep8
Drew and Tee visit a salvage yard that specialises in stoneware. Blown away by the quality and rarity of some of the items, Drew is forced to haggle hard by the canny dealer. S15, Ep9
Gaby Roslin helps ex-England footballer Lee Sharpe find his dream property on the Costa del Sol. He has £400,000 to spend on his home. S1, Ep1
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one!
Drew heads to Petworth in West Sussex - the antiques capital of the south. Plus, he bids on an unusual fire screen in Lancashire, but the owner drives a hard bargain! S10, Ep8
At a stately home in Staffordshire, Drew uncovers a hidden 19th century gem that the owners were oblivious to. And in the Lake District, he digs out some of Britain's mining past. S10, Ep9
Angus helps Claire Sweeney sell off some very glamorous items. Plus, Christopher Biggins needs to declutter - can he part with any of his beloved art collection? S1, Ep3
Angus visits Debbie McGee and finds a treasure trove of magical items, but what is she willing to sell? And Rav Wilding is keen to sell some family heirlooms. S1, Ep4
Angus helps Wayne Sleep shift a wardrobe of costumes worn over his decades-spanning career. Plus, Jodie Kidd reveals a stable full of family treasures. S1, Ep5
Love Spoons And Magic Tricks. Izzie Balmer and Mark Hill head to Wales for the start of a new trip in Pembrokeshire. Magic tricks and a folding cake stand head to auction. S27, Ep6
What's Occurring In Wales? On the second leg of Izzie Balmer and Mark Hill's first-ever road trip, they battle for bargain antiques in the towns and villages of Carmarthenshire. S27, Ep7
Treasures And Trinkets Abound. Doyenne of the jewellery world, Izzie Balmer and 20th century design whizz Mark Hill raid the antiques shops of Stroud, Cirencester and beyond. S27, Ep8
Wowed By Tribal Baby Hood. Izzie Balmer and Mark Hill motor through Oxfordshire and the Midlands searching for hidden treasures to take to auction. S27, Ep9
A Very Cuddly Grand Finale. Mark and Izzie's final outing, where they fall in love with cuddly toys, dumbwaiters, and early 20th century glass. Who will make the biggest profit? S27, Ep10
Ollie Allen is challenged to revamp a workbench. EJ Osborne works on a metal table frame, and Guy Trench repurposes a collection of car exhaust parts. S7, Ep14
Jay Blades sees hidden potential in an old bookcase, a dated plant stand and a set of dining chairs. How will these unwanted items be transformed? S7, Ep15
Leigh-Anne Treadwell is tasked with transforming a dull chair. Sarah Moore repurposes a mediaeval style tent, and Ollie Allen works on a wooden chest. S7, Ep16
California Dreams. A woman won $5,000,000 on a scratch card. She can now move her family of five out of their two-bedroom apartment and into a stunning Orange County home. S12, Ep3
Mortgage Free In Atlanta. After winning $1,000,000, a family want to live mortgage free and buy a huge home in Atlanta. They're looking for a place with a few projects. S12, Ep4
Boldly Built By Shatner. William Shatner surprises his longtime assistant with a kitchen refresh. Jonathan and Drew incorporate her and William's shared love of horses. S6, Ep11
Leann Rimes' Lifesaving Thanks. LeAnn Rimes calls on Jonathan and Drew to turn her life-saving friend's inadequate kitchen and bleak deck space into an entertainer's dream. S2, Ep6
The Skirrid Inn. The team visit one of the oldest pubs in Wales, where allegedly criminals were sentenced to death on the first floor and hung in the stairwell. S1, Ep10
Balgonie Castle. The team investigate disturbing reports of a mysterious green lady in a Scottish castle with a history of murder, torture and war. S1, Ep11
Teleshopping.
Seeing an untapped source of rare items, Drew tours Catalonia looking for some chic Spanish antiques. In Peralada, Drew is blown away by a 17th Century house full of treasures. S13, Ep8
Drew is on a road trip, travelling to Norfolk, Pembroke and Essex. In Pembroke, he finds an old church that has been converted into an antiques store with a varied selection. S13, Ep3
Fred and Richard Fairbrass want to move out of London with their mum. They have a two-and-a-half million-pound budget to spend on their countryside house. S1, Ep2
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one!
Gaby Roslin helps dancer Brendan Cole to settle down in London with his new girlfriend. He has a budget of £700,000 to spend on his new home. S1, Ep3
Gaby Roslin helps music producer David Gest to find a quintessentially English home in Cambridge. He has a budget of up £1.6 million for a beautiful home. S1, Ep4
Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep6
Nova Scotia Homecoming Queen. Oceanfront properties are on the list as David helps a lucky lottery winner find her dream home when she returns to Shelburne, Nova Scotia, Canada. S15, Ep9
Second Home Sanctuary. David returns to his childhood home in Minnesota to help a couple who've sold their inherited farmland to find a lakeside cabin for family holidays. S15, Ep10
City Mouse vs. Country Mouse. A couple with a $2 million budget asks David to help find a dream home in Ontario, Canada. They want a lot of space for him, and some bling for her. S15, Ep11
Million Dollar Start. A North Carolina local won a million dollars just before his 27th birthday. David helps the lucky winner search for homes south of Raleigh. S15, Ep12
Dreaming On The Chesapeake Bay. A retired couple wins $1 million in the North Carolina Powerball and can finally buy the vacation home of their dreams. S2, Ep4
Music City Dream Home. A Kansas couple wins $1 million on a Powerball ticket. They are finally ready to make the move to their dream city of Nashville. S2, Ep5
Utah Mountain Dream Home. The winners of a $1 million Powerball look for their dream home in the mountains of Utah. S2, Ep6
Paradise In Puerto Rico. A $1-million New York State Lottery win means early retirement in Puerto Rico for Ana and Rafael. S2, Ep7

Episode 91. British couples seek to swap grey skies for sun, sea and sand abroad. With the help of property experts, can they find the home of their dreams? S1, Ep11

programmes.show_name: Who Do You Think You Are?
programmes.show_description: Una Stubbs. Actress Una Stubbs sets out to discover the story of her paternal grandparents, uncovering a tale of illegitimacy and poverty in the process. S10, Ep1
